print(pd.io.json.dumps(business_ids))

import pandas as pd
import json
business_data = locals()['var_function-call-10835990269364412742']
df = pd.DataFrame(business_data)
indianapolis_businesses = df[df['description'].str.contains('Indianapolis, IN')]

print(json.dumps(formatted_business_ids))
